title: The validation bot stands down: app submissions open to all
summary:
We told the validation bot to stop rejecting free-tier app submissions and welcomed three new community projects to the showcase.

We updated the validation script so the bot stops auto-rejecting app submissions based on tier. Whether you just showed up or you've been here for years, if you built something on our infrastructure, you can submit it to the showcase.

People keep building things. Today's additions to the community showcase include VeroClass AI for Brazilian educators, Metadatagenerator for microstock creators, and TelegramChannelAI for automating channel management.

We overhauled the internal dashboards for Bring Your Own Prompt (BYOP) requests. The event pipeline now tracks developer user IDs, giving us a clearer picture of who is building what so we can actually support them properly.
